hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -qE 'my-analysis/|\.claude/skills/|\.claude/memory/' && { f=/home/dorian/repo/RMDB-2024-Analyze/.claude/.write-counter; c=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); c=$((c+1)); echo "$c" > "$f"; if [ "$c" -ge 3 ]; then echo 0 > "$f"; echo '{"systemMessage":"已修改多个文档，建议运行 maintain skill 检查","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"已累计修改3+个文档。建议激活 maintain skill 检查交叉引用和格式一致性。说"维护文档"即可。"}}'; fi; } || true

cat /home/dorian/.claude/projects/-home-dorian-repo-RMDB-2024-Analyze/memory/observed_*.md 2>/dev/null | head -200 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"以上是跨会话的观察记录。如果用户提到相关话题，可以提及已有观察。"}}' || true

f=/home/dorian/repo/RMDB-2024-Analyze/.claude/.conv-counter; c=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$c" -gt 0 ] && [ $((c % 5)) -eq 0 ]; then echo 0 > "$f"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"对话计数已达到 5 的倍数。请调用 commit skill 提交所有修改并推送到远程仓库。"}}'; fi
